title: Guide Config
description: Configuration for the station TV guide, defining editorial blocks and scheduling behaviour

startHour.description: Start hour in 24h format (values above 24 represent next-day hours, e.g. 26 = 02:00)

endHour.description: End hour in 24h format (values above 24 represent next-day hours)

character.description: Editorial character of the block (e.g. 'Short-form, news, briefings')

maxDurationMinutes.description: Preferred maximum video duration in minutes for this block

preferredTags.description: Tags that are preferred for this block

blocks.description: Ordered list of editorial blocks that define the daily schedule

bufferMinutes.description: Buffer time in minutes between scheduled entries (default: 15)

defaultDurationMinutes.description: Default assumed duration in minutes when a video has no duration metadata (default: 30)

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last configuration update
